requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (PSQCA / PS/IEC 60598) at 230 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（PSQCA / PS/IEC 60598），230 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（PSQCA / PS/IEC 60598），230 V 50 Hz

summary.en: LED luminaires sold in Pakistan are expected to meet electrical-safety requirements based on the IEC 60598 series, which the Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) adopts as Pakistan Standards (PS) — typically referenced as PS/IEC 60598-1 (general requirements and tests) plus the relevant Part 2 for the luminaire type. Where lamps and luminaires fall under PSQCA's mandatory Conformity Assessment list, the importer/manufacturer must obtain PSQCA conformity assessment and apply the PSQCA conformity/quality marking before the product is placed on the Pakistan market. Key safety aspects mirror the IEC base: protection against electric shock (creepage and clearance, insulation, touch current), thermal endurance, and mechanical strength. The product must be rated for the Pakistan grid: 230 V, 50 Hz single phase.
summary.zh: 在巴基斯坦销售的 LED 灯具应满足以 IEC 60598 系列为基础的电气安全要求，巴基斯坦标准与质量控制局（PSQCA）将其采纳为巴基斯坦标准（PS）——通常以 PS/IEC 60598-1（一般要求与试验）加相应灯具类型的第 2 部分引用。当灯具属于 PSQCA 强制合格评定清单时，进口商/制造商须在产品投放巴基斯坦市场前取得 PSQCA 合格评定并加施 PSQCA 合格/质量标志。核心安全要素与 IEC 基础一致：防触电（爬电距离与电气间隙、绝缘、接触电流）、热耐久性及机械强度。产品须按巴基斯坦电网额定：单相 230 V、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 在巴基斯坦銷售的 LED 燈具應滿足以 IEC 60598 系列為基礎的電氣安全要求，巴基斯坦標準與質量控制局（PSQCA）將其採納為巴基斯坦標準（PS）——通常以 PS/IEC 60598-1（一般要求與試驗）加相應燈具類型的第 2 部分引用。當燈具屬於 PSQCA 強制合格評定清單時，進口商/製造商須在產品投放巴基斯坦市場前取得 PSQCA 合格評定並加施 PSQCA 合格/質量標誌。核心安全要素與 IEC 基礎一致：防觸電（爬電距離與電氣間隙、絕緣、接觸電流）、熱耐久性及機械強度。產品須按巴基斯坦電網額定：單相 230 V、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: PS/IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 60598-1, administered by PSQCA)
PSQCA Act 1996 — Conformity assessment and mandatory marking for items on the PSQCA Conformity Assessment list

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; both share the IEC 60598-1 technical base. For luminaires within scope, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is the mandatory third-party route, administered by CNCA and tested at CNCA-authorized laboratories (e.g., CQC). Chinese products are designed for the China grid: 220 V, 50 Hz single phase / 380 V three phase. CCC certificates and GB-standard test reports are issued for the China market and are not automatically recognised by PSQCA.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；两者同以 IEC 60598-1 为技术基础。对于范围内灯具，中国强制性产品认证（CCC）为强制第三方路径，由 CNCA 管理并在 CNCA 授权实验室（如 CQC）检测。中国产品按中国电网设计：单相 220 V、50 Hz / 三相 380 V。CCC 证书及 GB 标准检测报告为中国市场出具，不被 PSQCA 自动认可。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；兩者同以 IEC 60598-1 為技術基礎。對於範圍內燈具，中國強制性產品認證（CCC）為強制第三方路徑，由 CNCA 管理並在 CNCA 授權實驗室（如 CQC）檢測。中國產品按中國電網設計：單相 220 V、50 Hz / 三相 380 V。CCC 證書及 GB 標準檢測報告為中國市場出具，不被 PSQCA 自動認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)

gap.en: Both Pakistan (via PS/IEC 60598) and China (via GB/T 7000.1) build on the same IEC 60598-1 base, so the core safety test content is largely harmonized. The practical gaps are conformity-assessment and voltage gaps: (1) Pakistan uses PSQCA conformity assessment and the PS conformity/quality mark for items on its mandatory list — CCC and GB test reports are not automatically accepted, and conformity is typically handled through a Pakistan-resident importer; (2) the nominal supply voltage differs — Pakistan is 230 V, China is 220 V (both 50 Hz), so products must be rated and marked for 230 V operation and verified for thermal/insulation performance at the higher nominal voltage; (3) marking, instructions and warnings should be presented appropriately for the Pakistan market (English/Urdu as required by the importer). Re-testing or report alignment to the PS/IEC 60598 edition accepted by PSQCA is advisable; confirm whether the specific luminaire type is on the current PSQCA mandatory Conformity Assessment list.
gap.zh: 巴基斯坦（通过 PS/IEC 60598）与中国（通过 GB/T 7000.1）同以 IEC 60598-1 为基础，核心安全试验内容基本协调。实际差距在于合格评定与电压：（1）巴基斯坦对强制清单项目采用 PSQCA 合格评定及 PS 合格/质量标志——CCC 及 GB 检测报告不被自动接受，且合格评定通常通过巴基斯坦本地进口商办理；（2）标称电压不同——巴基斯坦为 230 V，中国为 220 V（均 50 Hz），产品须按 230 V 运行额定并标注，并在较高标称电压下验证热/绝缘性能；（3）标志、说明及警告应按巴基斯坦市场适当呈现（按进口商要求采用英文/乌尔都文）。建议按 PSQCA 接受的 PS/IEC 60598 版本重新检测或对齐报告；请确认具体灯具类型是否在现行 PSQCA 强制合格评定清单内。
gap.zht: 巴基斯坦（通過 PS/IEC 60598）與中國（通過 GB/T 7000.1）同以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，核心安全試驗內容基本協調。實際差距在於合格評定與電壓：（1）巴基斯坦對強制清單項目採用 PSQCA 合格評定及 PS 合格/質量標誌——CCC 及 GB 檢測報告不被自動接受，且合格評定通常通過巴基斯坦本地進口商辦理；（2）標稱電壓不同——巴基斯坦為 230 V，中國為 220 V（均 50 Hz），產品須按 230 V 運行額定並標註，並在較高標稱電壓下驗證熱/絕緣性能；（3）標誌、說明及警告應按巴基斯坦市場適當呈現（按進口商要求採用英文/烏爾都文）。建議按 PSQCA 接受的 PS/IEC 60598 版本重新檢測或對齊報告；請確認具體燈具類型是否在現行 PSQCA 強制合格評定清單內。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where listed — PSQCA conformity assessment and PS conformity/quality marking required for lamps/luminaires on the PSQCA Conformity Assessment list; PS/IEC 60598 is the adopted safety standard. Confirm the specific product type against the current PSQCA list.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; safety per GB/T 7000.1-2023 (replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026)

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire electrical safety in Pakistan is assessed against PS/IEC 60598 (PSQCA-adopted from IEC 60598), with PSQCA conformity assessment and PS marking required where the product is on the mandatory Conformity Assessment list. The IEC base is shared with China's GB/T 7000.1, so test content is largely harmonized, but Chinese CCC/GB reports are not automatically recognised by PSQCA and conformity is usually arranged through a Pakistan-resident importer. Note the 230 V (vs China 220 V) nominal voltage — products must be rated and marked accordingly. Confirm the current PSQCA list status for the specific luminaire type.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦 LED 灯具电气安全依据 PS/IEC 60598（PSQCA 由 IEC 60598 采标）评定，当产品列入强制合格评定清单时须取得 PSQCA 合格评定并加施 PS 标志。IEC 基础与中国 GB/T 7000.1 共通，试验内容基本协调，但中国 CCC/GB 报告不被 PSQCA 自动认可，合格评定通常通过巴基斯坦本地进口商安排。注意 230 V（相对中国 220 V）标称电压——产品须相应额定并标注。请确认具体灯具类型在现行 PSQCA 清单中的状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦 LED 燈具電氣安全依據 PS/IEC 60598（PSQCA 由 IEC 60598 採標）評定，當產品列入強制合格評定清單時須取得 PSQCA 合格評定並加施 PS 標誌。IEC 基礎與中國 GB/T 7000.1 共通，試驗內容基本協調，但中國 CCC/GB 報告不被 PSQCA 自動認可，合格評定通常通過巴基斯坦本地進口商安排。注意 230 V（相對中國 220 V）標稱電壓——產品須相應額定並標註。請確認具體燈具類型在現行 PSQCA 清單中的狀態。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp + LED Driver Safety (PS/IEC 62560 / PS/IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯 + LED 驱动器安全（PS/IEC 62560 / PS/IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈 + LED 驅動器安全（PS/IEC 62560 / PS/IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting (the common screw/bayonet retrofit bulbs) sold in Pakistan are assessed against PS/IEC 62560 (PSQCA-adopted from IEC 62560 — safety specifications for self-ballasted LED lamps for >50 V). Separate LED drivers / control gear are assessed against PS/IEC 61347-2-13 (adopting IEC 61347-2-13 — particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules). Where these lamp categories appear on the PSQCA mandatory Conformity Assessment list, PSQCA conformity assessment and the PS conformity/quality mark are required before market placement. Products must be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz; isolation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance and marking requirements follow the adopted IEC content.
summary.zh: 在巴基斯坦销售的通用照明自镇流 LED 灯（常见的螺口/卡口替换灯泡）依据 PS/IEC 62560（PSQCA 由 IEC 62560 采标——>50 V 自镇流 LED 灯安全规范）评定。独立 LED 驱动器/控制装置依据 PS/IEC 61347-2-13（采标 IEC 61347-2-13——LED 模块用直流或交流供电电子控制装置的特殊要求）评定。当上述灯类出现在 PSQCA 强制合格评定清单时，须在投放市场前取得 PSQCA 合格评定并加施 PS 合格/质量标志。产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定；绝缘等级、介电强度、热耐久性及标志要求遵循采标的 IEC 内容。
summary.zht: 在巴基斯坦銷售的通用照明自鎮流 LED 燈（常見的螺口/卡口替換燈泡）依據 PS/IEC 62560（PSQCA 由 IEC 62560 採標——>50 V 自鎮流 LED 燈安全規範）評定。獨立 LED 驅動器/控制裝置依據 PS/IEC 61347-2-13（採標 IEC 61347-2-13——LED 模組用直流或交流供電電子控制裝置的特殊要求）評定。當上述燈類出現在 PSQCA 強制合格評定清單時，須在投放市場前取得 PSQCA 合格評定並加施 PS 合格/質量標誌。產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定；絕緣等級、介電強度、熱耐久性及標誌要求遵循採標的 IEC 內容。

standards_or_laws: PS/IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage >50 V — Safety specifications (Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 62560, administered by PSQCA)
PS/IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 61347-2-13)

summary.en: China's equivalent for self-ballasted LED lamps is GB 24906-2010 / GB 24819-2009 (safety specifications for self-ballasted LED lamps), and for LED drivers GB 19510.14-2014 (control gear for lamps — particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), both aligned with the IEC base (IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13). CCC certification may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps and for drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market. Chinese CCC reports are issued for the China market and are not automatically accepted by PSQCA.
summary.zh: 中国对自镇流 LED 灯的对应标准为 GB 24906-2010 / GB 24819-2009（自镇流 LED 灯安全要求），对 LED 驱动器为 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——LED 模块用直流或交流供电电子控制装置的特殊要求），均与 IEC 基础（IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13）对齐。在中国居民市场，自镇流 LED 灯及特定功率范围内的驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证。中国 CCC 报告为中国市场出具，不被 PSQCA 自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國對自鎮流 LED 燈的對應標準為 GB 24906-2010 / GB 24819-2009（自鎮流 LED 燈安全要求），對 LED 驅動器為 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——LED 模組用直流或交流供電電子控制裝置的特殊要求），均與 IEC 基礎（IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13）對齊。在中國居民市場，自鎮流 LED 燈及特定功率範圍內的驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證。中國 CCC 報告為中國市場出具，不被 PSQCA 自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: PS/IEC 62560 and PS/IEC 61347-2-13 share the same IEC technical base as China's GB 24906 and GB 19510.14, so the underlying safety test content is largely harmonized. The gaps are conformity-assessment, voltage, and marking: (1) Pakistan requires PSQCA conformity assessment and the PS mark for in-scope lamps/drivers — CCC and GB reports are not automatically accepted; (2) products must be rated for 230 V (vs China 220 V) at 50 Hz, with thermal and dielectric performance verified at the higher nominal voltage; (3) if the LED driver is sold as a standalone product it is assessed in its own right against PS/IEC 61347-2-13 — confirm whether the specific driver power/voltage range is on the PSQCA mandatory list; (4) conformity is generally arranged via a Pakistan-resident importer. Re-test or align reports to the PS/IEC editions accepted by PSQCA and verify the current mandatory-list status before shipment.
gap.zh: PS/IEC 62560 与 PS/IEC 61347-2-13 与中国 GB 24906 及 GB 19510.14 同以 IEC 为技术基础，底层安全试验内容基本协调。差距在于合格评定、电压与标志：（1）巴基斯坦对范围内灯/驱动器要求 PSQCA 合格评定及 PS 标志——CCC 及 GB 报告不被自动接受；（2）产品须按 230 V（相对中国 220 V）、50 Hz 额定，并在较高标称电压下验证热及介电性能；（3）若 LED 驱动器作为独立产品销售，须按 PS/IEC 61347-2-13 单独评定——请确认具体驱动器功率/电压范围是否在 PSQCA 强制清单内；（4）合格评定通常经巴基斯坦本地进口商安排。出货前请按 PSQCA 接受的 PS/IEC 版本重新检测或对齐报告，并核实现行强制清单状态。
gap.zht: PS/IEC 62560 與 PS/IEC 61347-2-13 與中國 GB 24906 及 GB 19510.14 同以 IEC 為技術基礎，底層安全試驗內容基本協調。差距在於合格評定、電壓與標誌：（1）巴基斯坦對範圍內燈/驅動器要求 PSQCA 合格評定及 PS 標誌——CCC 及 GB 報告不被自動接受；（2）產品須按 230 V（相對中國 220 V）、50 Hz 額定，並在較高標稱電壓下驗證熱及介電性能；（3）若 LED 驅動器作為獨立產品銷售，須按 PS/IEC 61347-2-13 單獨評定——請確認具體驅動器功率/電壓範圍是否在 PSQCA 強制清單內；（4）合格評定通常經巴基斯坦本地進口商安排。出貨前請按 PSQCA 接受的 PS/IEC 版本重新檢測或對齊報告，並核實現行強制清單狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where listed — PSQCA conformity assessment and PS marking required for self-ballasted LED lamps / LED drivers on the PSQCA Conformity Assessment list; PS/IEC 62560 and PS/IEC 61347-2-13 are the adopted safety standards. Confirm the specific product against the current list.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (scope/power dependent) — CCC may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps and certain LED drivers under CNCA-C10-01; safety per GB 24906-2010 and GB 19510.14-2014

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps and standalone LED drivers in Pakistan are assessed against PS/IEC 62560 and PS/IEC 61347-2-13 (PSQCA adoptions of the IEC standards), with PSQCA conformity assessment and PS marking required where the product is on the mandatory Conformity Assessment list. The IEC base is shared with China's GB 24906 / GB 19510.14, so test content is largely harmonized, but Chinese CCC/GB reports are not automatically recognised. Products must be rated and marked for 230 V / 50 Hz, and a standalone driver is assessed in its own right. Confirm the current PSQCA list status and arrange conformity via a Pakistan-resident importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦的自镇流 LED 灯及独立 LED 驱动器依据 PS/IEC 62560 及 PS/IEC 61347-2-13（PSQCA 对 IEC 标准的采标）评定，当产品列入强制合格评定清单时须取得 PSQCA 合格评定并加施 PS 标志。IEC 基础与中国 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 共通，试验内容基本协调，但中国 CCC/GB 报告不被自动认可。产品须按 230 V / 50 Hz 额定并标注，独立驱动器须单独评定。请确认现行 PSQCA 清单状态，并通过巴基斯坦本地进口商安排合格评定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦的自鎮流 LED 燈及獨立 LED 驅動器依據 PS/IEC 62560 及 PS/IEC 61347-2-13（PSQCA 對 IEC 標準的採標）評定，當產品列入強制合格評定清單時須取得 PSQCA 合格評定並加施 PS 標誌。IEC 基礎與中國 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 共通，試驗內容基本協調，但中國 CCC/GB 報告不被自動認可。產品須按 230 V / 50 Hz 額定並標註，獨立驅動器須單獨評定。請確認現行 PSQCA 清單狀態，並通過巴基斯坦本地進口商安排合格評定。
